title: This NEW Hermes Update Builds Agents From Scratch
summary: Hermes introduces a Blank Slate mode that lets users build AI agents from scratch by starting with minimal components and adding only necessary tools. This approach reduces bloat, prevents unwanted feature drift from updates, and simplifies agent configuration for lean use cases.
writeup: The video covers Hermes' new Blank Slate mode, which builds AI agents from scratch by starting with minimal components and adding only the tools a given task requires. The approach matters for lean use cases: it reduces bloat and prevents unwanted feature drift introduced by updates. The concrete takeaways center on minimalist agent design, where stripping configuration down to necessary skills simplifies workflow automation and keeps agents focused.
